pub fn arb_discovered_dependency() -> impl Strategy<Value = DiscoveredDependency> {

str-3ky9.12: Add execution-time dependency gap detection

enabling frontends to report dependencies found at execution time that
static analysis missed (unmocked imports, subprocess-spawning APIs).

Rust:

- Add discovered_dependencies field to ExecuteResult with serde
  default + skip_serializing_if empty

- Add create_mock_params_for_discovered() in auto_mock.rs to convert
  discovered deps into MockConfigs via the standard classification pipeline
- Update all test fixtures constructing ExecuteResult across 15 modules

TypeScript:
- Add DiscoveredDependency interface and DepDetectionKind type to protocol.ts
- Add discovered_dependencies to ExecuteResponse and RawExecuteResult
- Wrap sandbox require in executeInstrumented to detect:
  - Unmocked external module imports (not in mock registry)
  - Subprocess-spawning module imports (child_process)
- Wire discovered_dependencies through buildExecuteResponse
- Add fast-check property tests for DiscoveredDependency round-trips
- Add integration tests for dep gap detection scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
